1755610.name: Midnight Blues
1755610.description:
A mysterious detective tracks down two highly-skilled criminals, threatening to turn the NYPD on them if they don't carry out his plans of purging a local crime family. Join them on a path of misery, regret, and violence. It's only a matter of time before the strings being pulled start to tangle...

• 20 levels
• 5 playable characters
• 33 weapons
• Synthwave/Darksynth soundtrack by various artists

WARNING: THIS GAME IS RAGE-INDUCING!
